title: Forbidden Trails
writer: Scott R. Dunlap, Charles Alden Seltzer
actors: Buck Jones, Winifred Westover, Stanton Heck
plot: While on his deathbed, rancher Larry Harlan begs his partner Quinton "Squint" Taylor to locate and protect his daughter Marion. Squint journeys to Kansas City, searching for Marion, but fails to find her. On the train trip home, S...
